title: Documentation Dependency Registry (foundation skeleton)
description: Validates ${CLAUDE_HOME}/hooks/config/doc-dependencies.json — the foundation-shipped skeleton declaring cross-file cascade rules and entity-parity registries consumed by pre-write-guard.sh and the librarian capabilities (rename-history-sync, wikilink-repair, entity-parity, session-close Step 2c). Per-vault additive overlay rows live in the paired vault-overlay.json file (schema: ${CLAUDE_HOME}/schemas/vault-overlay-schema.json — https://claude-stem.example/schemas/vault-overlay/v1.json). Adopter-facing walkthrough (skeleton vs overlay, merge precedence, hand-editing, known constraints): docs/doc-dependencies-conventions.md. Authored by Plan 81 SP01 Session 16 (2026-05-10) per T-28a deferral disposition; structural shape is mirrored from vault-overlay-schema.json (which itself was authored first, 2026-05-08, as the parallel authoritative reference).

version.description: Registry version. Locked at 2; consumers reject mismatched versions to surface schema drift early. Mirrored by vault-overlay.json version field.

description.description: Human-readable description of registry purpose. Foundation skeleton ships a description tagging the foundation-repo + plan provenance; consumers do not parse this.

generated_by.description: Provenance string. Foundation install ships this populated with the authoring plan/session reference; consumers do not parse this.

schema_notes.description: Free-form notes about cross-file conventions, rename-history semantics, vault-overlay merge precedence, and per-consumer expectations. Not consumed by runtime; documentation surface for the registry author and adopter.

entries.description: Cascade-rule entries. Foundation skeleton ships generic entries (e.g., va-hub-spoke); per-vault entries layer additively from overlay-master.json at runtime.

id.description: Stable identifier. Overlay row with id matching a skeleton id replaces the skeleton row at consumer-side merge time.

kind.description: Entry kind. Common values: directory-write-constraint, directory-membership-cascade, hub-spoke-cascade, cross-file-type-union. Unconstrained for forward-compatible additions; consumers tolerate unknown kinds with advisory warnings.

primary_dir.description: Primary directory the entry governs (for directory-* kinds). Mutually exclusive with primary.

primary.description: Primary file path the entry governs (for hub-* / cross-* kinds). Mutually exclusive with primary_dir.

primary_scope.description: Scope qualifier for directory-membership-cascade (e.g., top-level-children, recursive).

mirrors.description: Mirror entries that must stay synchronized with primary. Heterogeneous field-set per kind.

rule.description: Rule label consumed by pre-write-guard advisory emission (e.g., if-primary-changes-mirrors-must-be-reviewed, hub-stub-must-have-matching-spoke, deny-list).

severity.description: Advisory severity. warn = inform on stderr, allow write; deny = block write.

denied_types.description: deny-list-kind entries: registered frontmatter type values (governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types) denied in the primary_dir scope.

rationale.description: Human-readable rationale for the entry. Surfaced in advisory messages for traceability.

notes.description: Free-form notes for entry maintainers. Not consumed by runtime.

path_inferred_exceptions.description: registered frontmatter type values (governance/frontmatter-rules.json#types) whose path-inference exempts them from the entry's union check (cross-file-type-union kind).

rename_history.description: Append-only rename audit trail. Populated by librarian rename-detect at session-close Step 2b. Empty array means no known renames since instrumentation landed.

entities.description: Entity-parity registry. Foundation skeleton ships generic entity types (skill, plan, memory-file) that mirror across vault and ${CLAUDE_HOME} surfaces; per-vault entity types layer additively from vault-overlay.json. Underscore-prefixed string keys (_comment, _note, _schema_version, etc.) are permitted as inline documentation and ignored by consumers.

^_.description: Underscore-prefixed metadata key. Ignored by consumers.

canonical.description: Path template with {placeholder} tokens. Per-vault placeholders (e.g., {project_namespace}) require consumer-side resolution against user-manifest.json or environment.

canonical_field.description: Field name on canonical-source frontmatter that consumers compare against mirror values.

instance_enumerator.description: Enumerator strategy for entity instances. Format: <strategy>:<arg> (e.g., glob:${CLAUDE_HOME}/skills/*/SKILL.md).

exclude_basenames.description: Basenames to exclude from instance enumeration (e.g., MEMORY.md for the memory-file entity).

mirrors.description: Mirror surfaces consumers verify against canonical.
